name: Mediterranean Orzo Salad
method: Make the orzo pasta per package directions. Drain and chill quickly.
Incorporate the cherry tomatoes, spring onions, bell peppers,
coriander, dill, olives, and capers in a wide mixing dish.
Insert the pasta orzo. Get the dressing done.
Mix the lime juice, lime zest, olive oil, cloves, oregano, and coarse
salt and pepper sprinkle to taste in a shallow cup. Whisk to blend.
Put the salad over the coating and swirl until thoroughly mixed, and
the dressing is well covered with the orzo pasta.
Cover with creamy feta cheese bits. When serving, protect and chill in
